prompt: clean polished vector logo mark based on a child's hand-drawn monogram. The letters A U P are combined into one connected symbol where the tall A is on the left with two vertical lines at top, the U curves down from the middle of the A, and the P connects to the right side of the U. Keep the exact same structure as the original child's drawing but make it clean and professional. Simple black linework on white background, bold smooth strokes like the original marker drawing but refined. Below the monogram in a playful hand-lettered font write avie's utility pouches in lowercase. Logo only, minimal, sticker-ready, no extra decorations, preserve the childlike spirit of the original design
